visual_description: Two men in white shirts sit at a cluttered desk with laptops and microphones, one wearing headphones and both focused on their screens. The man on the right gestures with his hand while looking at his laptop, and the man on the left remains still, looking forward. The room is dimly lit with maps and equipment visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
